summary: Applied accepted KB boundary refactor to product and system knowledge: product now owns users/stories/visual UIs; system now owns flat component specs, API/adapters/extension/agency/compilers/builds/graph/knowledge/roadmap/validation; lexicon updated.
knowledge_changes: Rewrote product overview around users, stories, and visual UIs only.
Rewrote product stories to remove implementation/tool/heartbeat wording and add gated agency, diff-table feedback, graph navigation, drift, and sanitation acceptance signals.
Rewrote product users to define maintainers, agents/subagents, extension/workflow authors, and future external users without treating access surfaces as visual UIs.
Deleted non-visual product UI docs for agent tools, skills, and future adapters.
Rewrote product visual UI docs for status panel, board, and graph navigation.
Flattened system KB from nested clients/components/compilers/flows/runtime docs into flat component docs.
Added system agency.md to define heartbeat as bounded system mechanism for gated agency.
Rewrote system architecture.mmd to map flat component docs.
Updated file-structure.md with generic KB contract, flat CodeWiki system set, and component-doc map.
Updated API/adapters/extension/compilers/builds/graph/knowledge/roadmap/validation-gateway/overview docs to align truth boundaries and loop semantics.
Updated lexicon with visual product UI, system access surface, gated agency, and heartbeat definitions.
assumptions: Documentation-only pass; no executable code or tests changed.
Graph and roadmap generated state were intentionally not refreshed by this build.
open_questions: Pass-validation persistence remains a configurable policy decision rather than always-on durable truth.
